subject: [PATCH v2 09/21] nfsd: fix version mismatch loops in nfsd_acl_init_request()

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd_acl_init_request function where it incorrectly checks for supported versions by using rqstp->rq_vers instead of the loop variable i, causing an infinite loop and incorrect results. The fix involves replacing rqstp->rq_vers with i to correctly determine the supported version range. This patch addresses an issue introduced by a previous commit that allowed containers to set supported NFS versions.
